name: ENS Subname Management
description: Set, transfer, or resolve ENS subnames programmatically (e.g., agent.normie.eth, vault.normie.eth). Enables namespace-as-product for any organization with an ENS name.
use_case: Agent operator owns normie.eth. Creates 4354.normie.eth pointing to Zori's wallet automatically when a Normie is awakened. Each Normie gets a human-readable name.

verification.criteria: Post-tx the namehash resolves to the agent on the registry, and setAddr returns the target address.
